reviews.title: Crashes constantly
reviews.body: The app crashes every time I open it. Complete waste of time. Crashes on startup after latest update.
reviews.author: user1

reviews.title: Terrible performance
reviews.body: Battery drain is insane. The app crashes and freezes my phone. Very slow and laggy.
reviews.author: user2

reviews.title: Lots of bugs
reviews.body: Constant crashes and the app freezes. Battery drain is a real problem. Please fix the crashes.
reviews.author: user3

reviews.title: Needs dark mode
reviews.body: Please add dark mode. The interface is too bright at night. Also needs dark mode badly.
reviews.author: user4

reviews.title: Average experience
reviews.body: It works but the app is very slow. Would love to see offline mode added. Dark mode would help.
reviews.author: user5

reviews.title: Okay but missing features
reviews.body: Decent app but needs offline mode. Also requesting dark mode feature. Performance could be better.
reviews.author: user6

reviews.title: So-so
reviews.body: Battery drain is noticeable. The app crashes occasionally. Customer support was helpful though.
reviews.author: user7

reviews.title: Pretty good
reviews.body: Love the clean interface. Great app overall. Customer support is excellent and very responsive.
reviews.author: user8

reviews.title: Works well
reviews.body: Clean interface and easy to use. Love using this app daily. Customer support responded quickly.
reviews.author: user9

reviews.title: Mostly great
reviews.body: Great app with clean interface. Just wish it had offline mode. Easy to use and intuitive.
reviews.author: user10

reviews.title: Amazing app
reviews.body: Best app I have ever used. Love the clean interface. Customer support is amazing and fast.
reviews.author: user11

reviews.title: Love it
reviews.body: Love this app! The interface is clean and beautiful. Best app for productivity.
reviews.author: user12

reviews.title: Fantastic
reviews.body: Absolutely love using this app. Great performance and clean interface. Best app hands down.
reviews.author: user13

reviews.title: Broke after update
reviews.body: Version 2.1.0 completely broke the app. It crashes on startup now. Please rollback this update.
reviews.author: user14

reviews.title: Widget support needed
reviews.body: Please add widget support for the home screen. Also a notification center widget would be great.
reviews.author: user15
